TEXT.source: NTU Corpus, Paiwan, Y2 read-speech; source EAF: 02EN106-1 tja01.eaf; anonymized speaker label: tja01

S.FORM: kasicuayan nu kaljarimuan a sengsengan i vavua, aicu a paiwanzuku a tjaljatjenglayan a mazazeliuzeliuljan a masengseng.
au anema a mazazeliuzeliuljan nu ayaya itjen, mavan na masasevalivalit a masengseng ta quma.
na nama nama’acuvucuvung a matevetevelj a sikasengsengan, ljakua inia pa papa’edjilj, azua tjimadju a mareqaliqali a maredrangidrangi katua masudjusudju a ma’acuvucuvung.
maciuciur a vaik a kipasengsengan tjiamadju.
matazua masasevalivalit a masengseng a patje ma’acuvung a sengsengan niamadju a penuljat.
aicu a namayatucu a sikasengsengan, ika itjen a masupaisu, au djaljav aravac a ma’acuvung a sengsengan uta.
saka timitja a pen mapuljat a tja marekiljivaljivak itjen, tja masasu marasurasudj itjen uta, aku bulay aravac a ma namayatucu a sikasengsengan tua nemanga a sengsengan.
liav aravac a tja maka tjakamanguaq a pen mapuljat pai.
selapai nu patjezayazaya anga itjen a masengseng, nuna qemiladj a mapuljat sa kipayipayiz ta tjakurung sa semenaysenay aza ljingav.
kipalingulj kipalingulj tua gadu nanguaq aravac nutja tjalangeda, kumalji a cuai anga a malenga ma malangedangeda anan azua senay.
namaya ta tjaljanguanguaqan azu a zuga nutja pacunan.
tucu a maljian anga zidai izua anga kika kikayi a sikasengsengan tu tua umaq, patagilj anga a paiwanzuku a caucau a semakikayi a kalakuda tua umaq.
manasika pazangal anga itjen a pacun ta sicuayan a mazazeliuzeliuljan a masengseng, tjuruvu a paiwanzuku a caucau a patjeljip aravac tjai taicu.
aicu a mazazeliuzeliuljan nanguaq aravac a kakudakudan na paiwanzuku, ma’ati itjen a marepusalasaladj tua tja sengsengan.
nanguaq a tja pacacikel satje pazazuru zuruing mavana nan nanguaq.
a na paiwanzuku a nanguanguaq a kakudan a tjara izua liavanga, makaya itjen a vaik a kipakim a mapuljat.
tjara tjara liav a tja djumaken a nanguanguaq a kakudakudan na paiwanzuku.
